title: Runtime error when using overflow integers
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```sql
CREATE TABLE t0(c1 INT);
CREATE VIEW v0(c0) AS SELECT 142805906 FROM t0 ;

SELECT * FROM v0 WHERE (v0.c0 NOT IN (v0.c0, (CASE ((-9223372036854775808)+(-1582704113)) WHEN v0.c0 THEN v0.c0 END )));
```


### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

No error

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

ERROR 1105 (HY000): runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference

server log:

key_bug_features: Runtime error with overflow integers in SQL query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(255), c3 DECIMAL(10,2));
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT c1, c3 FROM t1 WHERE c1 > 0;
SELECT * FROM v1 WHERE c3 IS NULL OR c3 < 10000000000;
SELECT * FROM v1 WHERE (c1 NOT IN (SELECT c1 FROM t1 WHERE c2 = 'test') OR (CASE WHEN c3 < 0 THEN c1 END) IS NOT NULL);
